scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*|bun/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.dev: cd artifacts/access-mi && PORT=${PORT:-8080} BASE_PATH=${BASE_PATH:-/} node_modules/.bin/vite --config vite.config.ts --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.build: cd artifacts/access-mi && node_modules/.bin/vite build --config vite.config.ts && node scripts/prerender-meta.mjs && rm -rf ../../dist && cp -r dist ../../dist
scripts.build:dev: cd artifacts/access-mi && node_modules/.bin/vite build --mode development --config vite.config.ts && rm -rf ../../dist && cp -r dist ../../dist
